meta.title: NODES — Your Second Brain, Visualized
meta.description: Delegate knowledge, track habits, visualize your neural network. Build a second brain that keeps you accountable.

hero.title: Delegate Knowledge.
hero.subtitle: Track habits, visualize connections, and build stability across every area of your life — with a system that remembers for you.
hero.graphToast: This is your node. Sign up to create your own.

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to Your Neural Network

steps.title: Create Cores
steps.description: Define gravity centers — the key areas of your life: Health, Career, Creativity, Relationships.

steps.title: Add Nodes
steps.description: Create action units within each core. Morning run, daily reading, meditation — every habit becomes a node.

steps.title: Track with Impulses
steps.description: Mark completions and watch stability grow. The system tracks your consistency so you don't have to.

philosophy.quote: Delegating knowledge frees your mind. When your habits live outside your head, you gain the clarity to focus on what matters.
philosophy.description: Your brain is for having ideas, not holding them. NODES externalizes your commitments into a living, visual system that never forgets.

features.title: Everything You Need to Build Stability

items.title: Graph Visualization
items.description: See your entire life as an interconnected network. Cores, nodes, and connectors form a neural map unique to you.

items.title: Stability Engine
items.description: Each node tracks its own stability score based on consistency. Watch habits crystallize from initiation to rock-solid.

items.title: Cores & Connectors
items.description: Organize nodes around gravity centers. Connectors link related habits so your network grows organically.

items.title: Impulse Tracking
items.description: One-tap habit completion. Binary, quantity, or duration — every type of habit finds its home.

items.title: Analytics & Heatmap
items.description: Historical stability charts, activity heatmaps, and per-node statistics reveal patterns invisible to the naked eye.

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: Web today, mobile tomorrow. Your neural network travels with you, always in sync.

pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Everything you need to start building your second brain.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For those who want deeper insights and integrations.

cta.title: Start Building Your Neural Network
cta.subtitle: Join people who delegate knowledge and build lasting habits.
cta.note: No credit card required. Start in 30 seconds.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.content: This Personal Data Processing Policy (hereinafter — the Policy) defines the procedure for processing and ensuring the security of personal data of users of the NODES service (hereinafter — the Service), carried out by the self-employed Kryakunov Daniil Romanovich (hereinafter — the Operator).

sections.title: 2. Purposes of Data Collection
sections.content: The Operator processes the User's personal data solely for the purposes of providing access to the Service's functionality, User identification, ensuring feedback, analyzing Service usage, and improving its quality.

sections.title: 3. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: Personal data processing is carried out based on the User's consent, expressed by accepting the terms of this Policy and the User Agreement upon registration with the Service.

sections.title: 4. Scope of Processed Data
sections.content: Personal data processed by the Service includes: email address, data about created content (nodes, cores), as well as technical information collected automatically (IP addresses, cookies).

sections.title: 5. Processing and Storage Procedure
sections.content: The Operator ensures the confidentiality of personal data and takes necessary legal, organizational, and technical measures for its protection. Data storage is carried out on servers located within the Russian Federation.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.content: The User has the right to receive information regarding the processing of their personal data, as well as the right to clarify, block, or destroy it if the data is incomplete, outdated, or inaccurate.

sections.title: 7. Final Provisions
sections.content: The Operator has the right to make changes to this Policy unilaterally. The new version of the Policy takes effect from the moment it is posted on the Service. Contact address for inquiries: support@nodes-tracker.ru.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.content: This User Agreement (hereinafter — the Agreement) is a legally binding document between self-employed Kryakunov Daniil Romanovich (hereinafter — the Grantor) and the Internet user (hereinafter — the User), arising in connection with the use of the NODES service.

sections.title: 2. Subject of the Agreement
sections.content: The Grantor provides the User with access to the Service's functional capabilities for personal record-keeping, habit tracking, and data visualization under a non-exclusive license.

sections.title: 3. Registration and Security
sections.content: The User bears full responsibility for the security of their credentials and for all actions performed under their account in the Service.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Software code, design, and other elements of the Service are objects of intellectual property of the Grantor. Use of Service elements without the Grantor's consent is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Payment and Subscription Terms
sections.content: Paid services (Pro subscription) are provided on a prepaid basis. Access to digital functionality is granted automatically after successful payment. Refunds are regulated by the current legislation of the Russian Federation.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Service is provided on an 'as is' basis. The Grantor does not guarantee uninterrupted operation and is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising in connection with the use of the Service.

sections.title: 7. Requisites and Contacts
sections.content: Executor: self-employed Kryakunov Daniil Romanovich. INN: 350201302146. Support: support@nodes-tracker.ru.

graphSection.title: See Your Life as a Network
graphSection.subtitle: Every habit, goal, and connection visualized as a living neural map.

features.title: Visual Stability
features.description: Watch how consistent habits glow brighter and unstable ones fade — your network tells the truth.

features.title: Organic Growth
features.description: Add nodes and cores as your life evolves. The graph adapts and grows with you.

features.title: Interconnected Insights
features.description: See how habits influence each other through connectors. Discover patterns you never noticed.
